top_signals.title: Inside Ukraine’s Battlefield Innovation Loop
top_signals.summary:
This exclusive Cogs of War interview is with Catarina Buchatskiy, the co-founder and director of analytics at the Snake Island Institute, a Kyiv-based defense analytics center, and Viktoriia Honcharuk, the institute’s director of defense technologies. We asked them to share their views on how Ukraine’s military and defense firms turn battlefield feedback into rapid innovation, what Western investors and defense tech companies can learn from Ukraine, and what a future Ukraine-West defense industrial partnership might look like. Sign Up for Our Newsletter American and allied defense companies often speak about testing their products in Ukraine, but few have consistently done so. Why

The post Inside Ukraine’s Battlefield Innovation Loop appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US to Provide Plutonium From Atomic Bombs to Fuel Nuclear Plants
top_signals.summary: The US is planning to distribute plutonium left over from Cold War-era weapons to commercial nuclear developers as part of the Trump administration’s efforts to accelerate the rollout of new reactors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A battle is brewing in the gold pits. Here are the winners and losers
top_signals.summary: Options volumes leaned bullish in both the SPDR Gold ETF (GLD) and VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Enhanced Games Parent Sinks After Troubled Debut Event
top_signals.summary: Enhanced Group Inc. shares fell to an all-time low after its inaugural sports-entertainment event was marred by technical problems and questions over its only world-record performance, disappointing investors weeks after its public listing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FBI warns of Kali365 phishing-as-a-service after April Microsoft 365 attacks
top_signals.summary: The law enforcement agency published an advisory on Thursday about Kali365 — a Telegram-based service for cybercriminals that allows them to capture legitimate "OAuth" tokens enabling widespread access to Microsoft 365 environments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Markets suggest stocks are on solid ground and crude oil could be in for a decline, Todd Gordon says - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Markets suggest stocks are on solid ground and crude oil could be in for a decline, Todd Gordon says  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Australia starts ‘high-risk’ life extension of its submarine fleet
top_signals.summary: The Australian National Audit Office (ANAO) has issued a damning verdict on Department of Defence planning for the life-extension program.

top_signals.title: Lithuania investigates theft of 600,000 state registry records by foreign actor
top_signals.summary: The Lithuanian Prosecutor General’s Office said Friday that attackers gained unauthorized access to more than 600,000 records managed by the Centre of Registers, the state agency responsible for handling property and legal entity records.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
